title: Cammie's Combat Tweaks
description: An overhaul to Minecraft's combat for both PvP and PvE
body:
--- Cammie's Combat Tweaks is a mod that overhauls Minecraft's combat, making it so it's much faster, more consistent, and less infuriating to play against. All the mod's features are configurable in-game through ModMenu, and there's quite a lot of features! All features can be found [here](https://github.com/CammiePone/Planning-Docs/blob/main/Cammies-Combat-Tweaks.md). ---
Join my Discord Join my Ko-Fi!
